nasb.text: for from now on five members in one household will be divided, three against two and two against three.

esv.text: For from now on in one house there will be five divided, three against two and two against three.

cnv.text: 從今以後，一家五口將起紛爭，三個反對兩個，兩個反對三個。

ccb.text: 从今以后，一家五口会彼此相争，三个人反对两个人，或是两个人反对三个人，

csbs.text: 从今以后，一家五口将要分裂：三个与两个，两个与三个分裂。
